title: delayed evangelion 20 222 dub australia
wikitext:
[]: delayed evangelion 2.0/2.22 dub australia             Quote Post by Cesario » Mon May 09, 2011 3:23 am ok, so i was gettin all crazy about the release of eva 2.0 on dvd in dub, but i went to my shops of 'expected' release date and it wasnt there, asked all the people in about 10 different stores and no one even had an release date on it. but after some searching around i heard that madman own rights for it or something similar to that and its being re-released for Australia (and probably other countries too) because i checked the funimation website and it says its been released, iv seen region 1 dvd/blurays on ebay, but nothing in relation to down under :S so yeh... just wondering if im on the right track with the madman delay thing? also any reason as to why the kids in aus are suffering? :P cheers for input

[]:             Quote Post by Wadels » Mon May 09, 2011 4:13 am Release date: 15th of June. http://www.madman.com.au/catalogue/view/14653/evangelion-2-22-you-can-not-advance- http://www.madman.com.au/catalogue/view/14652/evangelion-2-22-you-can-not-advance-bluray Madman said that Evangelion 2.22 would be released in June when they announced that they had acquired the distribution rights for it.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Thu Jun 09, 2011 1:44 am I believe it should be released now, just got an email from JB saying they have shipped mine out.

[]:             Quote Post by Cesario » Tue Jun 14, 2011 7:48 am yeh, i went on the JB website last night and it said they were doinig it on the 15 too! so me and my mate are heading down tomorrow to get it! cant wait
